name: pub.dev Packages API
description: The official package repository for Dart and Flutter apps, maintained by Google. Provides a REST API for searching packages, retrieving package metadata and version information, downloading package archives, and accessing publisher and scoring information.

potentialAction.name: Search Packages
potentialAction.description: Search for Dart and Flutter packages

potentialAction.name: Get Package Metadata
potentialAction.description: Retrieve metadata for a specific package

potentialAction.name: Get Package Publisher
potentialAction.description: Retrieve publisher information for a specific package

potentialAction.name: Get Package Score
potentialAction.description: Retrieve scoring data for a specific package including points, likes, and download counts

potentialAction.name: Get Package Names
potentialAction.description: Retrieve all package names for archiving or mirroring purposes

potentialAction.name: Get Package Name Completion Data
potentialAction.description: Retrieve top package names for autocomplete functionality
